facilities.name: Tacoma Recovery & Transfer Center
facilities.hours: Use Tacoma's solid waste page to confirm current public hours and holiday schedules before visiting the Mullen Street campus.
facilities.fees: Transfer-station charges vary by load type and size. Check Tacoma's current solid waste guidance before you drive.
facilities.rules: Secure your load and confirm current Tacoma campus rules, fees, and accepted materials before arrival.

facilities.name: Tacoma Recycle Center
facilities.hours: Use Tacoma's solid waste page to confirm current recycle-center hours and holiday schedules before visiting the Mullen Street campus.
facilities.fees: Many recycling services are material-specific and may be low-cost or resident-focused. Confirm current rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: Separate materials before you arrive and confirm current Tacoma recycling rules at the campus before unloading.

facilities.name: Tacoma Household Hazardous Waste Facility
facilities.hours: Use Tacoma's solid waste page to confirm current household hazardous waste hours and holiday schedules before visiting the Mullen Street campus.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste service is resident-focused. Confirm accepted items, quantity limits, and any fees before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside Tacoma's HHW program rules
facilities.rules: Review Tacoma's current HHW guidance to confirm accepted items and material-preparation rules before arriving.
